main_results: brand, model, and device type distribution
battery, threshold, impedance, and sensing parameter distributions
device subgroup analyses when sample size permits

reserved_future_papers: longitudinal trajectories of battery voltage, thresholds, impedance, and sensing
follow-up quality control using programming recommendations and actual follow-up intervals
outcome-linked CIED risk modeling only if automated clinical outcomes become available
